prompt: Sprint 5 is ending today. Help me: (1) move all unfinished stories to Sprint 6, (2) close Sprint 5 in JIRA, (3) mark the JIRA version 'v1.5.0' as released, and (4) publish a GitHub release v1.5.0 on the main branch with release notes. Project: ENG, site: mycompany.atlassian.net, repo: mycompany/eng-backend.

assertions.text: Moves incomplete issues to Sprint 6 via POST /rest/agile/1.0/sprint/{sprint6Id}/issue with an issues array
Closes the sprint via PUT /rest/agile/1.0/sprint/{sprintId} with state: 'closed'
Marks the JIRA version released via PUT /rest/api/3/version/{versionId} with released: true and releaseDate
If fixVersions is set on issues, uses correct array-of-objects format: [{"name": "v1.5.0"}] (not a flat string)
Creates GitHub release using 'gh release create v1.5.0 --title ... --notes ... --target main' (or --generate-notes)
Steps in correct order: find incomplete issues, move to Sprint 6, close Sprint 5, release JIRA version, publish GitHub release
Uses JQL to find incomplete issues in Sprint 5, e.g., project = ENG AND sprint = 'Sprint 5' AND status != Done
